title: cotoneaster horizontalis f. variegatus
intro: Cotoneaster horizontalis f. variegatus, also known as Variegated Rock Cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub native to Asia, characterized by its horizontal branches and attractive variegated leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cotoneaster horizontalis f. variegatus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being. However, I couldn't find reliable information on herbal preparations made from this plant, and its uses should be researched further before consumption.
